title: BehaviorProposal
description: A proposal describing an intended behavioral change to the OpenClaw sovereign runtime, including modifications, acceptance tests, and scope boundaries.

proposal_id.description: Unique identifier for this behavior proposal.

source.description: The origin of this proposal: m2 (cognition layer), operator (human), or internal (system-generated).

intent.description: A human-readable statement of what this proposal intends to accomplish.

target_paths.description: Filesystem paths that this proposal targets for modification.

path.description: The filesystem path to be modified.

operation.description: The type of filesystem operation to perform.

content.description: The content to be written, appended, or used in the modification.

modifications.description: The set of modifications this proposal will apply.

test_id.description: Unique identifier for this acceptance test.

command.description: The shell command to execute for this test.

expected_exit_code.description: The exit code that indicates test success.

acceptance_tests.description: Tests that must pass for this proposal to be considered successful.

allowed_paths.description: Paths that this proposal is permitted to touch.

denied_paths.description: Paths that this proposal is explicitly forbidden from touching.

scope_boundary.description: Defines the boundary within which this proposal may operate.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this proposal was created.

declared_side_effects.description: Optional list of known side effects this proposal may cause.

algorithm.description: The cryptographic algorithm used for signing.

signer_role.description: The role of the entity that produced this signature.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic signature over this proposal.
